scenes.captionText: Long, long ago, God made everything. He made the bright sun, the tall trees, and the deep blue water.

scenes.altText: Adam and Eve in the garden
scenes.captionText: God made the first people, Adam and Eve. He loved them very much and gave them a beautiful garden to live in.

scenes.altText: People building the Tower of Babel
scenes.captionText: Many years passed, and there were lots of people in the world. But they forgot about God and wanted to build a very tall tower to show how great they were.
God saw their tall tower. He mixed up their words so they couldn't understand each other anymore! This place was called Babel.
Because they couldn't talk to each other, the families had to stop building. They packed their things and moved away to find new homes.
One family leader was named Mizraim. He traveled far away and settled in a beautiful land with a big river. We call this land Egypt today.
Another family leader was named Cush. He moved his family to a land just south of Egypt, a place called Nubia.
A third leader was named Phut. He took his family to live in a wide, sunny place called Libya. God loved all these families in their new homes.
